title: 137 ABY

The following events took place in '''137 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Darth Krayt]] sent his [[Sith Minion|Sith minions]] to capture [[Marasiah Fel]] and to bring [[Cade Skywalker]] to him.<ref name="Broken">''[[Star Wars: Legacy: Broken]]''</ref>
*The [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] was [[Destruction of Ossus Jedi Academy|destroyed]] under orders from [[Darth Stryfe]] in an attempt to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] taking refuge inside.
*The [[Galactic Alliance Remnant|remnants]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and [[Empire-in-exile|forces loyal]] to [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] began talks to form a united front against the [[One Sith|Sith-controlled]] [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Trust Issues">''[[Star Wars: Legacy: Trust Issues]]''</ref>
*Darth Krayt ordered the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] to be [[Genocide on Dac|exterminated]] for [[Battle of Mon Calamari (Second Imperial Civil War)|assisting]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gar Stazi]]. Twenty-seven percent of [[Dac/Legends|Dac's]] population was [[Evacuation of Dac|evacuated]] by anti-Sith forces.
*Darth Krayt was [[Battle on Had Abbadon|murdered]] by [[Darth Wyyrlok (III)|Darth Wyyrlok]] after being severely wounded by [[Azlyn Rae]] and [[Celeste Morne]]/[[Karness Muur]].
*The [[Muur Talisman]] was destroyed.
*The [[Rakghoul]]s became extinct.
*Darth Wyyrlok was crowned the new [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] and [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]]. [[Morlish Veed]] became [[Regent/Legends|Imperial Regent]].
*Darth Krayt was resurrected on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].
